sections.paragraph:
δίϰη, ης, ἡ [cp. δείϰνυμι; ‘custom, right’, then punishment for violation of custom]

—1. as occasionally attested in Gk. lit., personified as a deity Justice Ac 28:4.

—2. associated with δ. as a judicial hearing is the assessment of penalty for violation of what is right justice, punishment 2 Th 1:9; Jd 7.
